rules.rule: Preserve canonical explicit occasion decisions already represented in the snapshot.
Assign when completed decision score G >= 80; this is the strongest overall-score band.
Assign only when completed rationale/summary literally documents rarity, scarcity, uncommon/specialist status, hard-to-match status, or named pre-Hispanic/Diné/Navajo/Balkan scarcity evidence.

Assign when completed name/rationale/summary or format documents a casual-service form (cafe, bakery, deli, pizzeria/pizza, bagel, market/canteen/counter, food truck/hall, barbecue, churro/cookie/donut, empanada/taqueria/taco, sandwich/burger), or preorder/mobile/event format.
Assign when an existing cuisine/specialty facet is present and completed scratch score S >= 70.
Retain/assign only from explicit canonical occasion or rare-find evidence; no inference from cuisine or score.
Leave empty where no explicit occasion/rare-find, G >= 80, literal scarcity evidence, supported casual-service form, or cuisine facet plus S >= 70 applies.
